title: US Approves Nearly $9 Billion in Weapons Sales to Mideast States
title_cn: 美国批准向中东国家出售近90亿美元的武器
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has approved expedited arms transfers to Israel, Kuwait, Qatar and the United Arab Emirates, bypassing a standard congressional review to rush air defense missiles and laser guidance systems to the Middle East as the Iran war ceasefire seems ever more fragile.

title: Beijing Tells China Firms to Ignore US Sanctions on Refiners
title_cn: 北京要求中国企业无视美国对炼油商的制裁
summary: China ordered companies in the country not to comply with US sanctions on five domestic refiners linked to the Iranian oil trade, deploying a blocking measure introduced in 2021 that was aimed at protecting its firms from foreign laws it deemed unjustified.

title: HORMUZ TRACKER: Traffic Halts as Trump Weighs Iran’s New Offer
title_cn: 霍尔木兹追踪器：特朗普权衡伊朗的新提议，交通停止
summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has come to a virtual standstill while US President Donald Trump weighs Tehran’s latest peace proposal.

title: Major Russian Oil Export Port Primorsk Suffers Fire From UAV
title_cn: 俄罗斯主要石油出口港普里莫尔斯克遭无人机袭击
summary: Russia said Ukraine attacked Primorsk port on the Baltic Sea, a key oil export hub, causing a fire that local authorities said was quickly extinguished.

title: US Jobs Report to Show Resilience in the Wake of Iran War
title_cn: 美国就业报告显示伊朗战争后的韧性
summary: The energy shock from the Iran war may be casting a shadow over the outlook for the US economy, but the labor market is yet to register any signs of it.

title: Takaichi Set for Australia Visit to Strengthen Japan Alliance
title_cn: 高市将访问澳大利亚以加强日本同盟
summary: Japan’s prime minister is set to arrive in Australia to strengthen ties with one of her country’s strongest allies as she seeks to build on an updated regional strategy laid out in Vietnam.

title: OPEC+ Meeting Offers Chance to Show Unity After UAE’s Shock Exit
title_cn: 阿联酋意外退出后，欧佩克+会议提供了展示团结的机会
summary: This weekend’s talks among OPEC+ nations provide the oil producer group with an opportunity to project unity after the shock departure of longtime member the United Arab Emirates.

title: Philippines Accuses China of Conducting Illegal Marine Research
title_cn: 菲律宾指责中国进行非法海洋研究
summary: The Philippine Coast Guard said four Chinese vessels were conducting illegal marine scientific research in its waters and threatened to deploy aircraft and boats to repel them.

title: Oil Tanker Pricing Feud Embroils Centuries-Old London Market
title_cn: 油轮定价之争持续了几个世纪——旧伦敦市场
summary: A legal claim from one of the world’s largest oil traders is throwing a spotlight on an arcane but critical corner of global finance — the multibillion-dollar freight market and the 282-year-old City of London institution that sits at the heart of it.

title: South African Wine Estates Become Focus for Global Buyers
title_cn: 南非葡萄酒庄园成为全球买家关注的焦点
summary: Global investors are pouring money into commercial wineries in and around Cape Town, even as wine sales slow worldwide. French, German, and Norwegian consortiums are buying into one of the few wine-producing regions where vineyard prices are still climbing. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Golden Tempo Takes Kentucky Derby, Makes History for Female Trainer
title_cn: Golden Tempo 拿下肯塔基德比，为女练马师创造历史
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — After being asked all week about the possibility of becoming the first woman to train a Kentucky Derby winner, Cherie DeVaux was nearly speechless when Golden Tempo charged from the back of the pack Saturday to make history for her.

title: Vietnam Inflation Quickens as Iran War Raises Energy Costs
title_cn: 伊朗战争导致能源成本上升，越南通胀加速
summary: Vietnam’s inflation picked up more than expected in April, as a surge in global energy prices driven by the Iran war began feeding through to transport and input costs.

title: Philippines Says Thousands Evacuated as Mayon Volcano Erupts
title_cn: 菲律宾称马荣火山喷发数千人撤离
summary: The Philippines said on Sunday that thousands of people have evacuated the area south of Manila after Mayon Volcano erupted, and authorities advised the public to stay out of the six-kilometer radius danger zone.

title: Japan’s Katayama Declines to Comment on FX Intervention For Now
title_cn: 日本片山暂时拒绝就外汇干预发表评论
summary: Japanese Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama declined to comment if authorities intervened to support the yen last week, after reports said they had entered the market for the first time since 2024.

title: Aegon, Barclays Say Prepare for Market Pain
title_cn: 荷兰全球保险集团 (Aegon) 和巴克莱银行 (Barclays) 表示为市场痛苦做好准备
summary: Skeptics including Aegon Asset Management and Barclays Plc are getting ready for April’s credit rally to potentially vanish as quickly as it appeared.

title: Spirit Shuts Operations After White House Bailout Collapses
title_cn: 白宫救助失败后 Spirit 关闭运营
summary: Spirit Aviation Holdings is winding down operations after the troubled US discount carrier buckled under the weight of surging fuel prices and a government bailout dangled by US President Donald Trump fell through. All Spirit flights have been canceled, and passengers have been advised not to go to the airport. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Columbia’s Outlook Revised to Negative as Trump Slams Colleges
title_cn: 特朗普猛烈抨击大学，哥伦比亚大学前景下调为负面
summary: Columbia University’s credit outlook was revised to negative by Moody’s Ratings, which cited rising risks tied to the “federal environment for higher education.”

title: Spirit Airlines Shuts Down at Airports Across US
title_cn: 精神航空关闭美国各地机场
summary: The collapse of Spirit Airlines is cascading through airports across the US, leaving passengers stranded mid-journey and sending rival carriers into rapid-response mode to contain the damage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/02/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 5/02/2026
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by The Telegraph Senior Foreign Correspondent Adrian Blomfield, Actor Ben McKenzie, The Points Guy Managing Editor Clint Henderson and GasBuddy Head of Petroleum Analysis Patrick De Haan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UAE Departs OPEC as Iran Feel Economic Sting of Blockade
title_cn: 由于伊朗感受到封锁的经济刺痛，阿联酋退出欧佩克
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. and Chevron Corp. posted stronger-than-expected earnings for the first quarter as higher oil and natural gas prices outweighed production outages from the Iran war. Bloomberg Opinion Energy and Commodities Columnist joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War Drags On as Blockade Continues in Hormuz
title_cn: 霍尔木兹封锁继续，伊朗战争持续
summary: Telegraph Senior Foreign Correspondent Adrian Blomfield provided an on-the-ground, and on the water, report from the Strait of Hormuz. Blomfield joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss how Iran maintains its blockade despite losing much of its naval forces. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spirit Ends Operations After White House Bailout Collapses
title_cn: 白宫救助失败后，精神号停止运营
summary: Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc. is winding down operations after the troubled US discount carrier buckled under the weight of surging fuel prices and a government bailout dangled by President Donald Trump fell through.

title: Trump Rues State of Iran Talks, Says Prefers Not to Strike
title_cn: 特朗普对伊朗国情谈判表示遗憾，表示宁愿不发动袭击
summary: President Donald Trump expressed displeasure with the current state of negotiations with Iran but stopped short of threatening fresh military action in the nine-week conflict that’s triggered a global energy crisis. Bloomberg News, Managing Editor, Middle East & Africa Paul Wallace, Bloomberg Economics Defense Lead Becca Wasser and Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Jeff Mason join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Berkshire Hathaway’s Cash Surges in Abel’s First Quarter as CEO
title_cn: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司在阿贝尔担任首席执行官的第一季度现金激增
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc.’s cash pile soared to its highest level ever and operating earnings jumped in Greg Abel’s first quarter as chief executive officer.

title: Is This a Stock Market Melt-Up? Here Are Ways to Tell
title_cn: 这是股市熔断吗？这里有一些方法可以告诉你
summary: The stock market is on a tear again, with high-flying technology stocks propelling the S&P 500 Index toward fresh records and luring swaths of momentum-chasing investors. Speculation that the worst of war in Iran is over has traders piling into artificial intelligence darlings such as Broadcom Inc. and Intel Inc. — and sent semiconductor stocks higher in 21 of the last 23 trading sessions.

title: OPEC+ Provisionally Agrees June Quota Increase, Delegate Says
title_cn: 代表称 OPEC+ 暂时同意增加 6 月配额
summary: Major OPEC+ nations came to a provisional agreement on another modest but symbolic increase to supply targets for June, in the group’s first move since the UAE’s surprise exit, a delegate said.

title: Bloomberg House Miami Highlights F1 Grand Prix
title_cn: 迈阿密彭博之家聚焦 F1 大奖赛
summary:
Formula One racing returns to Miami this weekend, with the fourth leg in the world championship speeding through south Florida. Bloomberg Hot Pursuit Co-hosts Matt Miller and Hannah Elliott join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss all things F1.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India-Linked Ship Carrying Cooking Fuel Manages Hormuz Exit
title_cn: 与印度有关的运输烹饪燃料的船舶管理霍尔木兹出口
summary: An India-linked tanker laden with liquefied petroleum gas has managed to transit the Strait of Hormuz, a rare crossing that underscores the country’s struggle to alleviate an historic energy crisis.

title: Hungary Warns of Drought Hit to Agriculture From April Dry Spell
title_cn: 匈牙利警告四月干旱将给农业带来干旱
summary: Hungary’s incoming government said it plans to take emergency steps to help farmers as a dry spell during much of April is leading to a severe drought in the grain-producing country.

title: Malaysia’s Anti-Graft Agency to Quiz Ex-Minister Over Arm Deal
title_cn: 马来西亚反贪机构就武器交易对前部长进行质询
summary: Malaysia’s anti-graft agency said it has summoned former economy minister Rafizi Ramli for questioning following a probe into a deal involving Arm Holdings Plc.

title: Nvidia’s Push Into Physical AI Sparks Rally in Asian Partners
title_cn: 英伟达进军物理人工智能领域引发亚洲合作伙伴反弹
summary: The list of Asian stocks that benefit from business partnership with Nvidia Corp. is getting longer, as the region further integrates into the AI chip giant’s business ecosystem.

title: Russian to Plead Guilty in Oil and Gas Facility Hack
title_cn: 俄罗斯承认石油和天然气设施黑客攻击罪
summary: A Russian hacker who broke into and damaged critical oil and gas infrastructure in the US, Ukraine and other countries will plead guilty to charges that carry as many as 27 years in prison, according to federal filings and his lawyer.

title: Actor Ben McKenzie Explores Cryptocurrency Fraud in Doc.
title_cn: 演员本·麦肯齐 (Ben McKenzie) 在《医生》中探索加密货币欺诈。
summary: Actor Ben McKenzie, known for his role in The OC, discusses his transition from acting to investigating cryptocurrency through a new film he wrote and directed: Everyone Is Lying to You for Money. McKenzie explains to Bloomberg This Weekend's David Gura and Christina Ruffini he was motivated by pandemic boredom and a suggestion to buy Bitcoin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Vibe Coding Isn’t the End of the Software Engineer
title_cn: 为什么 Vibe 编码不是软件工程师的终结
summary: Generative AI has turned coding from a specialized skill into something anyone can do with a simple prompt. A warehouse owner is revolutionizing his shipping software with AI and a creative designer vibe coded  her first app with zero technical experience. Computer programmers are doing it too, but a director at Google Cloud AI says vibe coding does not mean the end of serious engineering. As professionals and hobbyists alike are writing code with AI, hiring for junior developers is falling fast and researchers warn companies are making a dangerous short-term bet. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside the Booming Market for Dinosaur Fossils | Odd Lots
title_cn: 恐龙化石蓬勃发展的市场内部零股
summary: Two years ago, Citadel's Ken Griffin paid almost $45 million for a stegosaurus skeleton, making it the most expensive fossil ever sold at auction. So why are dinosaur bones joining the collections of millionaires instead of museums? How does the private market for fossils actually work? And how similar is it to the market for art and other antiquities? In this episode, we speak with Salomon Aaron, a director at London-based gallery David Aaron, where he is the gallery's in-house broker for dinosaur fossils. We talk about how fossils are found and priced, what it's like to work alongside dinosaur hunters, how his gallery identifies potential buyers, and why Joe thinks something about the birds-to-dinosaurs evolutionary pipeline is off. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chinese Court Rules Firms Can’t Lay Off Workers on AI Grounds
title_cn: 中国法院裁定企业不得以人工智能为由解雇员工
summary: A Chinese court ruled that companies cannot terminate employees just to replace them with artificial intelligence systems, as authorities juggle the need to stabilize the domestic labor market with a global race to develop AI technologies.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Hand Pentagon More Control Over AI Systems
title_cn: 微软和亚马逊让五角大楼对人工智能系统有更多控制权
summary: The Pentagon has struck agreements with more technology companies for expanded use of advanced artificial intelligence tools on classified military networks, according to a Defense Department statement and two defense officials briefed on the matter.

title: ‘Golden’ or ‘Garbage’: Milken Signals New Private Credit Era
title_cn: “黄金”还是“垃圾”：米尔肯标志着新的私人信贷时代
summary: Months before Jamie Dimon’s infamous remark about more than one “cockroach” lurking in credit markets, TCW Group Inc. Chief Executive Officer Katie Koch warned the direct lending industry was due for a reckoning.

title: Musk’s Trial Against OpenAI Hits Some Rough Spots in First Week
title_cn: 马斯克针对 OpenAI 的审判第一周就遇到了一些困难
summary: Elon Musk set out to tell a jury that his falling out with OpenAI was a simple tale of betrayal.

title: EBay Soars on Report GameStop Is Preparing Takeover Bid
title_cn: 据报道 GameStop 正在准备收购要约，eBay 股价飙升
summary: EBay Inc. jumped more than 15% in after-hours trading on Friday after the Wall Street Journal reported that video-game retailer GameStop Corp. is preparing a bid for the company.

title: Apple Raises Mac Mini’s Starting Price to $799 After AI Frenzy Drains Supply
title_cn: AI 狂热耗尽供应后，苹果将 Mac Mini 的起价提高至 799 美元
summary: Apple Inc. raised the starting price of its Mac mini desktop to $799 from $599, adjusting to inventory shortages driven by AI demand and the tight supply of processors.

title: Fmr. BET CEO Debra Lee on Media Landscape, Handbag Line
title_cn: 先生。 BET 首席执行官 Debra Lee 谈媒体格局、手袋系列
summary: Former BET Chair & CEO Debra Lee discusses the changing media landscape, why good content will always find its audience, and her new luxury handbag line. She talks with Romaine Bostick for "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Forecast Tops Estimates Even as Mac Shortages Linger
title_cn: 尽管 Mac 短缺问题依然存在，但苹果的预测仍高于预期
summary: Apple Inc. delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, even as it warned that memory-chip costs will increase and that shortages of Mac computers will persist for “several months.”

title: Shopify Analyst Who Saw Selloff Coming Says Too Soon to Buy
title_cn: 看到抛售即将到来的 Shopify 分析师表示，现在买入还为时过早
summary: The analyst who slapped the only sell rating on Shopify Inc. over valuation concerns ahead of its blistering rout said it’s still too soon to jump back in.

title: Disney’s New CEO Is Exploring a ‘Super App’ For Theme Park Tickets, Movies and More
title_cn: 迪士尼新任首席执行官正在探索主题公园门票、电影等的“超级应用程序”
summary: Walt Disney Co. senior executives are discussing how to unify the company’s disparate mobile apps and turn its streaming service into the first stop for all things Disney, a place where users can book park tickets, buy merchandise, play games and watch movies, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Stocks Close at New Record High Capping Solid Earnings Week
title_cn: 美国股市收盘创历史新高，为本周稳健的盈利奠定基础
summary: The S&P 500 Index extended a record-breaking streak Friday to mark a fifth week of gains after solid earnings from tech mega caps. Oil dropped amid hopes that the US and Iran were getting closer to a ceasefire agreement.

title: Nuclear AI Startup Fermi Promised Land and Ample Power. But It Couldn't Sign a Single Client
title_cn: 核人工智能初创公司费米承诺土地和充足的电力。但它无法签署单个客户
summary: Now the ex-CEO is waging a battle for Fermi’s future and its vision of atomic-powered data centers in the Texas panhandle.

title: OpenAI’s Revenue Chief Says Enterprise Business ‘Accelerating’
title_cn: OpenAI 收入主管表示企业业务“加速”
summary: A recent report raised concerns about OpenAI missing its growth targets.

title: The Online Games Where the House Always Wins
title_cn: 赌场总是获胜的在线游戏
summary: Online casino-style games like Monopoly GO! are huge. Could new scrutiny challenge how they do business?

title: Apple Forecasts Sales Growth Amid Memory Shortage | Bloomberg Tech 5/1/2026
title_cn: 苹果预测内存短缺导致销量增长彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 1 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Apple’s strong outlook amid the continued memory supply crunch. Plus, Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki discusses the gaming platform’s "aggressive push to enhance safety" that tempered user growth. And, Bloomberg spoke with OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar who pushes back on a report that the AI leader is missing its own targets.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Some Investor 'Choosiness' for AI Debt: Cisar
title_cn: Cisar：一些投资者对人工智能债务“挑剔”
summary: Winnie Cisar, global head of strategy at CreditSights, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." After a $300 billion AI debt binge that spanned every corner of the credit market, investors are starting to show some signs of fatigue. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BMO Turns to AI and Quantum Computing to Predict Earthquakes
title_cn: BMO 利用人工智能和量子计算来预测地震
summary: Bank of Montreal is betting on artificial intelligence and quantum computing to help predict earthquakes and respond to wildfires as part of the Canadian bank’s expansion in the US.

title: Roblox Shares Dive on Slower User Growth
title_cn: Roblox 股价因用户增长放缓而暴跌
summary: Roblox stock plummeted after the company slashed its full-year bookings forecast, admitting that new age-verification and child-safety features are creating major short-term friction for user growth. Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Twilio CEO on Its ‘Milestone Quarter’
title_cn: Twilio 首席执行官谈其“里程碑季度”
summary: Twilio reported its fastest revenue growth in over three years, fueled by a massive surge in AI-driven demand. Twilio CEO Khozema Shipchandler discussed what he called a “milestone quarter” with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar says the company is meeting objectives and sees a “vertical wall of demand” for its products. Bloomberg's Shirin Ghaffary joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow to discuss those comments on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BMO's Milchanowski on Quantum's Banking Sector Impact
title_cn: BMO 的 Milchanowski 谈量子对银行业的影响
summary: BMO Chief AI and Quantum Officer Kristin Milchanowski discusses how cutting edge AI and quantum tech will impact business, and the banking sector, for the foreseeable future. She talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘Final Fantasy XIV’ Faces Key Test as Thousands of Fans Gather
title_cn: 数千粉丝齐聚，《最终幻想14》面临关键考验
summary: The longrunning online game has a lot of work to do to recover from the disappointing ‘Dawntrail’ expansion

title: Meta Acquires Robotics AI Company to Help Build Humanoid Technology
title_cn: Meta 收购 Robotics AI 公司，帮助构建人形技术
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a startup developing artificial intelligence models for robots, as part of a major initiative to build humanoid technology.

title: Roblox to Challenge Unity, Unreal Engines With New AI Software
title_cn: Roblox 将利用新的 AI 软件挑战 Unity 和虚幻引擎
summary: Roblox Corp. is launching a new product that will position its popular video-game creation software to better compete with Unity Software Inc. and Epic Games, whose engines are used by most big-budget game-makers.

title: Senegal’s Faye Says Party at Risk as Tensions Simmer With Sonko
title_cn: 塞内加尔的费耶表示，随着桑科的紧张局势加剧，该党面临风险
summary: Senegal President Bassirou Diomaye Faye warned that the ruling party he founded with Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko is at danger of collapse amid growing signs of a rift between the two leaders.

title: Trump Weighs Iranian Peace Offer Without Ruling Out More Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普权衡伊朗的和平提议，但不排除发动更多袭击的可能性
summary: US President Donald Trump said he’ll review Iran’s latest peace proposal while not ruling out a resumption of military strikes should the Islamic Republic’s rulers “misbehave.”

title: How Britain Became a Disunited Kingdom in Five Charts
title_cn: 五张图表显示英国如何成为一个分裂的王国
summary: Local elections this week are expected to lay bare a new reality: the two-party system that has dominated British politics since World War II has broken down.

title: Guindos Rules Out Return to Politics After ECB Term Ends: Pais
title_cn: 金多斯排除欧洲央行任期结束后重返政坛：派斯
summary: European Central Bank Vice President Luis de Guindos rejected the idea of returning to Spanish politics once his term ends in May.

title: Taiwan’s Lai Circumvents China-Backed Blockade for Eswatini Trip
title_cn: 台湾赖智绕过中国支持的封锁前往斯威士兰
summary: Taiwan’s President Lai Ching-te arrived in Eswatini on Saturday after an earlier trip was derailed by several China-friendly African countries closing their airspace to his aircraft.

title: Armenia Summits Show Europe’s Caucasus Rivalry With Trump, Putin
title_cn: 亚美尼亚峰会显示欧洲在高加索地区与特朗普、普京的竞争
summary: Twin European summits in Armenia are pointing to an intensifying contest for influence between major powers in the strategic Caucasus region.

title: Australia to Boost Medicare Clinic Spending Amid Deficit Concern
title_cn: 澳大利亚因赤字担忧而增加医疗保险诊所支出
summary: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese said the coming budget will boost spending on Medicare urgent care clinics as his government moves to address cost of living concerns while dealing with a worsening fiscal outlook.

title: Trump Reviewing Iran’s Latest Offer But Doesn’t Rule Out Strike
title_cn: 特朗普正在审查伊朗的最新提议，但不排除发动袭击
summary: US President Donald Trump said he will review Iran’s latest peace offer but wouldn’t rule out restarting strikes on Tehran’s military targets should the regime “misbehave.”

title: Trump Threatens Deeper Cuts for US Troop Presence in Germany
title_cn: 特朗普威胁进一步削减驻德美军
summary: President Donald Trump said he plans to cut the US military presence in Germany by more than the 5,000-troop drawdown announced so far, even as Republican allies and NATO countries questioned the move.

title: Trump’s Germany Drawdown Questioned by Allies in US and NATO
title_cn: 特朗普的德国撤军计划受到美国和北约盟友的质疑
summary: A new US drawdown of roughly 5,000 troops from Germany over the next year prompted strong questions from both NATO allies and Republicans in Congress.

title: Morocco’s Crown Prince Gets Key Army Role in Sign of Elevation
title_cn: 摩洛哥王储在军队中担任重要职务
summary: King Mohammed VI of Morocco named his only son to a key army role, signaling a milestone for the crown prince’s preparations to eventually take the throne of a four-century-old ruling dynasty.

title: Mexico Agriculture Minister Replaced Ahead of USMCA Trade Review
title_cn: 墨西哥农业部长在 USMCA 贸易审查前被更换
summary: Mexican Agriculture Minister Julio Berdegue was replaced by an official focused on rural development in another shakeup of President Claudia Sheinbaum’s cabinet.

title: Mexican Governor Steps Down Temporarily After US Indictment
title_cn: 墨西哥州长在美国起诉后暂时辞职
summary: The Mexican governor charged by the US over alleged drug-related crimes stepped down temporarily while investigations are underway.

title: Cuba’s Remaining Lifelines in Peril as Trump Widens US Sanctions
title_cn: 随着特朗普扩大美国制裁，古巴剩余的生命线处于危险之中
summary: Sweeping new US economic sanctions on Cuba could chase international companies off the island as Donald Trump’s administration continues to threaten military force to dislodge the 67-year-old regime.

title: No Bailout Needed for Other US Low-Cost Airlines, Duffy Says
title_cn: 达菲表示，美国其他低成本航空公司不需要救助
summary: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said he doesn’t think the US government needs to provide financial lifelines for now to other low-cost carriers, following the collapse of Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc.

title: Russian Tuapse Oil Terminal Fire Extinguished After Attack
title_cn: 俄罗斯图阿普谢石油码头遇袭后大火被扑灭
summary: A fire at a marine terminal in Russia’s Black Sea port of Tuapse was extinguished following Friday’s Ukrainian drone strike, Krasnodar region emergency authorities said on Telegram.

title: Trump’s Feud With New York Masks Amtrak’s Spending Spree
title_cn: 特朗普与纽约的不和掩盖了美铁的大笔支出
summary: Advancement of a project in Baltimore shows how the railway is navigating the president’s second term.

title: Zelenskiy, Slovak PM Fico Keep Dialogue Open Despite Energy Rift
title_cn: 尽管能源分歧，泽连斯基与斯洛伐克总理菲科仍保持对话
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy and Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico agreed to continue high-level contacts despite ongoing differences over Russian energy supplies.

title: German Minister Says Europe Must Take More Onus on Security: DPA
title_cn: 德国部长表示欧洲必须在安全方面承担更多责任：DPA
summary: German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius said Europe must assume greater responsibility for security in the region, while emphasizing the continued importance of shared military interests with the US.

title: Japan’s Takaichi Lays Out Revamped Indo-Pacific Vision in Speech
title_cn: 日本高市在演讲中阐述了新的印太愿景
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi delivered a landmark speech to convey her vision for deepening her nation’s economic and security ties with the Indo-Pacific, with a view to making the region more resilient in the face of geopolitical challenges.

title: US Names Vietnam as ‘Priority’ Nation on IP Watch List
title_cn: 美国将越南列入知识产权观察名单“优先”国家
summary: The US Trade Representative identified Vietnam as a top concern in a new report on intellectual property rights, in a move that could prompt a fresh trade investigation into a leading trading partner.

title: Germany Is Preparing Supply Lines for a War, It’s Far From Ready
title_cn: 德国正在为战争准备补给线，但还远没有准备好
summary: In Bremerhaven on Germany’s North Sea coast, Europe’s largest car port is getting a €1.35 billion ($1.6 billion) upgrade. The state-funded investment is not for exporting more Mercedes-Benz and VW vehicles, but to reinforce loading docks to be able to transport military equipment like a 60-ton Leopard tank to future front lines.

title: Iran War Hits 60-Day Legal Deadline | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/01/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争已到 60 天法律期限 |权力平衡：最新版 05/01/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Representative Eugene Vindman (D-VA), says the administration “owes” Congress an explanation of its Iran strategy as the conflict nears the 60-day mark. Jessica Taylor, Senate and Governors Editor for the Cook Political Report, says the 2026 Senate map is "trending in Democrats' direction," citing the lingering Iran conflict and rising gas prices as political headwinds for Republicans. Jen Gavito, Senior Advisor with the Cohen Group, talks about the US planning to withdraw 5,000 US troops from Germany. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Picks Barr Over Musk-Backed Rival in Kentucky Senate Race
title_cn: 特朗普在肯塔基州参议员竞选中选择巴尔，而不是马斯克支持的竞争对手
summary: President Donald Trump endorsed Representative Andy Barr, one of the Republicans running to replace former Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell in Kentucky’s primary election later this month.
